scripts.dev:inner: concurrently -k -n web,api,worker,collector -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "node scripts/run-web.mjs" "node scripts/run-api.mjs" "node scripts/run-worker.mjs" "node scripts/run-collector.mjs"
scripts.setup:collector: npm install --prefix apps/review-collector && npx --prefix apps/review-collector playwright install chromium
